title: Capability
description: A single capability entry in a policy bundle. Defines what the agent is permitted to do with scope constraints.

allowedPaths.description: Path prefixes where file operations are permitted. Applies to File.Read, File.Write, File.Delete.

blockedPaths.description: Path prefixes explicitly denied. Takes precedence over allowedPaths.

allowedCommands.description: Base commands permitted for Shell.Exec (e.g., git, python, npm).

blockedCommands.description: Base commands explicitly denied for Shell.Exec.

maxFileSizeBytes.description: Maximum file size in bytes for file operations and artifact uploads.

maxOutputBytes.description: Maximum output size in bytes for Shell.Exec and tool outputs.

requiresApproval.description: Whether this capability requires user approval before execution.

approvalRuleId.description: Reference to the approval rule in the policy bundle's approvalRules array.

maxExecutionTimeSeconds.description: Maximum execution time per code block in seconds for Code.Execute.

allowCodeNetwork.description: Whether code executed via Code.Execute may access the network. Default false.
